Spring Data MongoDB - Core
  1. org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk

Packages that use org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core
MongoDB core support.
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk
Abstraction for MongoDB bulk write operations.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk used by org.springframework.data.mongodb.core
    Class
    Description
    Bulk
    Container for an ordered list of bulk operations that modify documents in one or more collections within a single request.
    BulkWriteOptions
    Options for executing a Bulk write, such as whether operations run in ordered or unordered mode.
    BulkWriteResult
    Result of a Bulk write execution.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk used by org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk
    Class
    Description
    Bulk
    Container for an ordered list of bulk operations that modify documents in one or more collections within a single request.
    Bulk.BulkBuilder
    Builder for defining bulk operations across one or more collections.
    Bulk.BulkSpec
    Builder for adding bulk operations (insert, update, replace, remove) to a single collection.
    BulkOperation
    A single operation (insert, update, replace, or remove) within a Bulk.
    BulkOperation.Remove
    Remove operation: delete documents matching the BulkOperation.Remove.query().
    BulkOperation.Update
    Update operation: update documents matching the BulkOperation.Update.query().
    BulkOperationContext
    Context for a BulkOperation, providing the target namespace (database and collection) and optional domain type used for mapping.
    BulkOperationContext.TypedNamespace
    Value object holding namespace (database and collection) information and an optional domain type used for mapping bulk operations.
    BulkWriteOptions
    Options for executing a Bulk write, such as whether operations run in ordered or unordered mode.
    BulkWriteOptions.Order
    Execution order for bulk write operations.
    BulkWriteResult
    Result of a Bulk write execution.
